## Pattern Name
A descriptive name for the pattern.

## Source Technology
What technology was analyzed?

## Pattern Description
Describe the optimization pattern discovered.

## Technical Details
### Optimization Type
- [ ] Caching strategy
- [ ] Memory management
- [ ] Algorithm improvement
- [ ] Concurrency pattern
- [ ] Data structure
- [ ] Other: ___

### Performance Impact
Estimated performance improvement (if known).

### Domain Applicability
Which domains can benefit from this pattern?
- [ ] Domain 1: Sovereign AI
- [ ] Domain 2: Prediction Markets
- [ ] Domain 3: Zero-Energy Computing
- [ ] Domain 4: Multi-Agent Swarms
- [ ] Domain 5: Healthcare AI
- [ ] Domain 6: Defense/Security

## Safety Considerations
Any safety or compliance considerations?

## Supporting Documentation
Link to any supporting analysis or documentation.

## Contributor
Name/handle of the contributor.
